items.title: Brace for $4 gas again: How U.S.-Iran tensions are threatening to end the price break at the pump
items.description: Americans got some relief at the gas pump in recent weeks, enough to slow down inflation. That might not last long as the U.S. and Iran continue to vie for control of the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: This overlooked index is a better investment than the S&P 500
items.description: We did the math over a 30-year period, and it’s not even close.

items.title: ‘It’s heartbreaking’: My brother claimed Social Security at 70. He died from cancer after one payment. Why wait to claim?
items.description: “I’ve always been a little skeptical of the government’s encouragement to delay claiming benefits.”

items.title: Your monthly Netflix bill is up 29% in just over a year. Critics say Washington needs to fix it.
items.description: Netflix is still a Wall Street favorite — and a target for government regulators

items.title: Three powerful forces are draining family wealth — and your estate plan is completely unprepared
items.description: From Medicaid cuts to an IRA tax trap, here are the real threats to your family’s inheritance and what to do about them.

items.title: What IBM’s profit warning means: Hardware is ‘eating everyone’s lunch’
items.description: The company said the shortfall in its software and infrastructure business was tied to clients spending on memory ahead of price hikes.

items.title: Taco Bell reportedly being investigated by health officials, as cyclosporiasis outbreak spreads
items.description: Shares of Taco Bell parent Yum Brands were down nearly 4% on Tuesday.

items.title: Wall Street has set a sky-high bar for companies to clear this earnings season. They just might pull it off.
items.description: Analysts have set a sky-high bar for second-quarter earnings. However, Piper Sandler thinks corporate America can still clear it.

items.title: Your stock portfolio is tied to the Japanese yen — and a looming intervention is flashing a major warning sign
items.description: What the link between the yen and U.S. stocks means for your portfolio.

items.title: Skip the lettuce, cook your other greens and more advice on avoiding cyclosporiasis
items.description: The outbreak of cyclosporiasis, which causes diarrhea, has sickened about 6,700 people since May.
